User.title: User Profile
User.description: User account configurations, goals, stats, and assigned exams.

username.description: The unique, lowercased username of the student or admin.

passcode.description: A 4-digit PIN passcode used for authentication.

slotIndex.description: The unique slot index (0, 1, 2) assigned to the profile.

dailyGoal.description: Daily question goal and streak statistics.

assignedExam.description: Custom assigned exam configurations and limits from the admin.

TestAttempt.title: Test Attempt
TestAttempt.description: A record of an exam or quiz attempt completed by a student.

totalQuestions.description: Total number of questions in the test.

subject.description: The subject category of the attempt.

FlaggedQuestion.title: Flagged Question
FlaggedQuestion.description: A question flagged by students due to formatting or font display issues.

/users/{username}.description: Top-level profiles of registered students and admins.

/users/{username}/attempts/{attemptId}.description: Subcollection storing historic mock test attempts for each student.

/flagged_questions/{questionId}.description: Collection of questions with reported display errors.
